title: The escalation between the US and Iran sends oil prices and global uncertainty soaring
summary: Reciprocal attacks and the threat over the Strait of Hormuz raise geopolitical tension and put pressure on Asian and US stock markets.

title: Artificial intelligence boosts semiconductor demand despite memory inflation and sector volatility
summary: The chip sector is torn between the AI boom, TSMC and ASML results, the arrival of new players like Meta, and regulatory uncertainty.

title: Fed monetary policy and inflation data set the course for fixed income and currency markets
summary: Investors await Warsh's appearances and US CPI data, in a context of rising yields and a strengthening dollar.

title: Value investing and dividends gain prominence in stock market rotation
summary: Investors seek refuge in value strategies, dividend funds and technical picks, taking advantage of expected long-term returns.

title: Mixed outlook for Asian markets weighed down by geopolitics and led by the tech sector
summary: Markets in China, Taiwan, Singapore and Malaysia point to a positive opening, while Japan's Nikkei swings between tech momentum and geopolitical pressure.

title: Space sector attracts investments as SpaceX faces hurdles and Indian startups ramp up production
summary: SpaceX sees its stock fall one month after its stock market debut, while India advances with its goal of launching a rocket per month.

title: Meta reinforces its commitment to artificial intelligence with its own chips and robust advertising business
summary: The company plans to produce its own AI processors starting in September while its core advertising business continues to generate massive cash flows.

title: Devastating floods in Bangladesh and fire in Bangkok leave dozens dead
summary: Torrential rains and a fire in a restaurant in Southeast Asia cause a humanitarian tragedy with more than 75 fatalities.

title: Ohtani reaches 350 home runs between Japan and the US while Sasaki is drafted by the Marlins
summary: The Japanese baseball star continues to make history, as the young pitcher begins his journey in the Major Leagues.

title: Jannik Sinner crowned two-time Wimbledon champion in men's tennis
summary: The Italian tennis player retains his title at the London tournament, confirming his dominance on grass.

title: Israel calls general elections for October 27 in a plebiscite on Netanyahu
summary: The Israeli prime minister puts his leadership to the test of citizens' trust in elections that are key for the region.

title: Republican Senator Gramm dies, key figure of the hardline wing against Iran
summary: The veteran politician, known for his firm stance on foreign policy, leaves a void in the US Congress.

title: China strongly criticizes Japan for its statements in the South China Sea
summary: Beijing lashes out at Japanese Foreign Minister Mogi, raising diplomatic tension in the Indo-Pacific region.

title: Japan seeks to reinvent its economic model amid pension reform, automotive industry and social technology
summary: The country faces structural challenges ranging from the new pension law to the transformation of the automobile sector and the use of AI for treating ADHD.

title: Switzerland and Norway eliminated from title contention in European football
summary: Embolo's red card and Haaland's goal drought mark the end of the dream for both national teams.

title: Stellantis offers attractive upside for patient investors despite lagging behind rivals
summary: The automotive giant presents key metrics that place it behind the competition, but its valuation opens up investment opportunities.

title: Private equity, Chinese bonds and oil well repurposing mark global investment trends
summary: Private equity firms accumulate cash, China tightens credit rating rules, and the US seeks to repurpose its abandoned wells.

title: German health funds suffer million-dollar real estate losses in a transforming market
summary: Investment in real estate weighs on German public insurers, while cities like Essen seek a new urban identity.

title: Multiple executives sell shares of their companies after strong market rallies
summary: Insider trading surges at firms such as ANI Pharmaceuticals, Rapport Therapeutics and Aura Minerals.

title: Retail investors debate strategies in a stock market marked by volatility and big tech
summary: Investment forums analyze everything from the potential of Microsoft and Paychex to swing trading of Snap in a highly uncertain environment.
